creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
Interesting, build failed for me with:
===>  Building for syncthing-1.27.4
go: errors parsing go.mod:
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/syncthing/work/syncthing-1.27.4/syncthing/go.mod:3: invalid go version '1.21.0': must match format 1.23
*** Error code 1

But go.mod contains exactly "go 1.21.0" in line 3. Perhaps related to commit fc8b353 in Syncthing repo?
